column1: # flag_rate_history.tsv -- the paper loop's monitor flag-rate, per paper-impl circle
# (self-improve.md lesson #7: watch the trajectory, not just the pass). Append-only:
# each circle that changes the flag landscape records one row of genuine measurements.
# verify/flag_rate.py anchors the NEWEST row to a live recomputation (so the log cannot
# drift from reality) and checks no plane is a permanent rubber-stamp (flag 0 across the
# window) or permanently saturated (flag = total). A "-" marks a monitor not yet present.
# columns: circle  gs_flag  gs_total  ov_flag  ov_total  route_flag  route_total  defects  external
